result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet-coalesce [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  config                             Path to a coalesce.json configuration file that will drive generation.  If not specified, it will search in current folder.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                       Show help information
  -d|--debug                         Wait for a debugger to be attached before starting generation
  -WhatIf|--what-if                  Do not write output files to disk.
  --verify                           Verify that no output changes have been made. Use in CI builds to ensure that codegen has not been forgotten.
  -v|--verbosity <LOG_LEVEL_OPTION>  Output verbosity. Options are Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical, None.
